_source: ITA חוזר מס הכנסה 7/2022 (תיאומי הצמדה לסעיף 121, indexation +2.4% from 2021 plus mid-year retroactive update); credit_point_annual_value = 12 × monthly ₪231 published by ITA Jan 2022.
_verification_status: BEST-EFFORT — 2022 had a mid-year retroactive indexation due to elevated CPI; the values above reflect the year-end consolidated figures used by Israeli payroll software at year-end 2022. CPA/user should re-verify against the original חוזר before relying on these values for filings older than 2024.
